title: Local LLM Serving (Ollama/LM Studio)
description: Implement local LLM serving using platforms like Ollama or LM Studio. Architect 'Privacy-First' applications that execute inference entirely on-device to minimize data exposure and latency.
objectives: Implement local LLM serving using platforms like Ollama or LM Studio.
Architect 'Privacy-First' applications that execute inference entirely on-device to minimize data exposure and latency.
